title: iris stolonifera var. vaga
intro: Iris stolonifera var. vaga, also known as Japanese iris or Japanese blue flag, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the iris family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its high content of iridin, a glycoside compound. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Iris stolonifera var. vaga is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Japanese medicine to treat various ailments.
